history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black hijab, a light grey long-sleeved athletic jacket, and black leggings stands on a red running track. The person is facing away from the camera, looking down the track. A bright orange drawstring bag with a green Nike logo and the words "TRACK & FIELD" printed vertically in white is slung over their shoulders. In their left hand, they are holding a red and blue starting block with markings from 12 to 17. The track is lined with white dashed lines and extends into the distance, curving slightly to the right. Surrounding the track are grassy fields and mature trees under a clear, bright blue sky. The lighting suggests it is early morning or late afternoon, with soft sunlight casting a warm glow. The overall mood is one of preparation and anticipation for athletic activity. The color palette is dominated by the red of the track, the green of the grass, the blue of the sky, and the vibrant orange of the bag, contrasted with the dark hijab and leggings. The style is realistic, capturing a moment of everyday athletic life.
